title: and 并列
prompt_en: Practice using and to connect nouns adjectives and verbs.
prompt_zh: 练习用and连接名词/形容词/动词，表达并列关系。
description: 掌握and连接并列成分的基本用法。
knowledge_points: 并列连词 and 连接 并列
teaching_markdown:
## and 并列连接
and 用来连接两个并列的成分——名词、形容词、动词或整个句子。

## 连接名词
- I like coffee and tea.
- I bought apples and bananas.

## 连接形容词
- She is smart and kind.
- The room is clean and comfortable.

## 连接动词
- I went to the store and bought some milk.
- She sat down and started to read.

## 常见错误
❌ I like drink coffee and tea. → and 前后结构要一致
✅ I like coffee and tea. / I like to drink coffee and tea.

title: or 选择
prompt_en: Practice using or to express choices and alternatives.
prompt_zh: 练习用or表达选择、疑问和替代。
description: 掌握or在疑问句和陈述句中表达选择的用法。
knowledge_points: 选择连词 or 选择 疑问
teaching_markdown:
## or 选择连接
or 用来提供选项或表达选择。

## 疑问句中选择
- Do you want tea or coffee?
- Is it big or small?
- Are you coming or staying?

## 陈述句中使用
- You can have tea or coffee.
- I can go today or tomorrow.

## 常见表达
- or not: Do you want to go or not?
- or something: Do you want coffee or something?
- either...or: You can either stay or go.

title: but 转折
prompt_en: Practice using but to express contrast and opposition.
prompt_zh: 练习用but表达转折和对比关系。
description: 掌握but连接两个相反或对比内容的用法。
knowledge_points: 转折连词 but 转折 对比
teaching_markdown:
## but 转折连接
but 用来连接两个意思相反或形成对比的内容。

## 基本结构
- I like him, but he doesn't like me.
- The food is cheap, but it's delicious.

## 主语不同的转折
- I wanted to go, but I was too busy.
- She tried her best, but she failed.

## 描述对比
- The hotel is small, but it's very clean.
- He is young, but he is very smart.

## 常见错误
❌ I like him but he doesn't like me.（缺少逗号可以接受，但加逗号更规范）
✅ I like him, but he doesn't like me.

title: however 对比
prompt_en: Practice using however to express contrast in formal contexts.
prompt_zh: 练习用however在正式语境中表达转折对比。
description: 掌握however在句首引出转折的正式用法。
knowledge_points: 转折副词 however 对比 正式
teaching_markdown:
## however 对比表达
however 比 but 更正式，通常放在句首，后面用逗号。

## 基本结构
- I wanted to go. However, I was too busy.
- The food was good. However, it was expensive.

## 表示对比
- She studied hard. However, she didn't pass.
- The hotel was nice. However, it was far from the beach.

## however vs but
- but: 连接两个分句，口语化
- however: 开启新句子，更正式

## 例句
- I like living in the city. However, it's very expensive.
- He is rich. However, he is not happy.

title: not only...but also 递进
prompt_en: Practice using not only...but also to express progression.
prompt_zh: 练习用not only...but also表达递进关系。
description: 掌握not only...but also连接两个递进成分的用法。
knowledge_points: 递进结构 not only but also 递进
teaching_markdown:
## not only...but also 递进
表示不仅……而且……"，强调后者的重要性。

scene_title: - She is not only a teacher
title: but also a writer.

scene_title: - The movie is not only funny
title: but also touching.

scene_title: - Not only does she speak English
title: but she also speaks Chinese.

scene_title: ❌ I not only speak English but also Chinese. → 前后结构不一致
✅ I speak not only English but also Chinese."
title: practice_foundation-integrated-express_并列与转折_notonlybutalso递进
because 原因
prompt_en: Practice using because to express reasons and causes.
prompt_zh: 练习用because表达原因和理由。
description: 掌握because引导原因从句的句首和句中位置。
knowledge_points: 原因连词 because 原因 理由
teaching_markdown:
## because 原因从句
because 表示因为"，说明某事发生的原因。

scene_title: - I stayed home because I was sick.
- She is happy because she passed the test.

title: so I went home. → because 和 so 不能同时使用
so I went home."
prompt_en: practice_foundation-integrated-express_因果与条件_because原因

title: so 结果
prompt_en: Practice using so to express results and consequences.
prompt_zh: 练习用so表达结果和后果。
description: 掌握so引导结果从句的用法。
knowledge_points: 结果连词 so 结果 后果
teaching_markdown:
## so 结果从句
so 表示所以"，引出前面动作的结果。

title: so I went to bed early.
so I bought a new one.
I went home."
prompt_en: practice_foundation-integrated-express_因果与条件_so结果

title: if 条件
prompt_en: Practice using if to express conditions and possibilities.
prompt_zh: 练习用if表达条件和假设。
description: 掌握if引导条件从句的基本用法（第一条件句）。
knowledge_points: 条件连词 if 条件 假设
teaching_markdown:
## if 条件从句
if 表示如果"，引导条件从句。

scene_title: ## 第一条件句（if + 现在时，主句 + will）
- Let me know if you need help.
- Call me if you get lost.
- Take an umbrella if it rains.
if 从句中用现在时表示将来，不用 will。

title: I'll stay home."
prompt_en: practice_foundation-integrated-express_因果与条件_if条件

title: unless 除非
prompt_en: Practice using unless to express negative conditions.
prompt_zh: 练习用unless表达否定条件（除非）。
description: 掌握unless引导条件从句表示"除非…否则…"。
knowledge_points: 条件连词 unless 除非 条件
teaching_markdown:
## unless 条件从句
unless 表示除非"，相当于"if not"。

scene_title: - I won't go unless you come with me.
- You can't enter unless you have a ticket.
- I won't eat unless I'm hungry.
- I won't buy it unless it's cheap.
- You can't drive unless you have a license.
- You won't pass unless you study.
## unless 与 if not 互换
- I won't go unless you come. = I won't go if you don't come.
- You can't enter unless you have a ticket. = You can't enter if you don't have a ticket."
title: practice_foundation-integrated-express_因果与条件_unless除非
as long as 只要
prompt_en: Practice using as long as to express sufficient conditions.
prompt_zh: 练习用as long as表达充分条件（只要）。
description: 掌握as long as引导条件从句的用法。
knowledge_points: 条件短语 as long as 只要 条件
teaching_markdown:
## as long as 条件从句
as long as 表示只要"，引导充分条件。

scene_title: - As long as you try your best
title: it's okay.

scene_title: - As long as it doesn't rain
title: we'll go.

scene_title: - As long as you study hard
title: you'll do well.

scene_title: - As long as you need help
title: I'll be here.
I would go to the doctor."
prompt_en: practice_foundation-integrated-express_因果与条件_aslongas只要

title: when 当…时
prompt_en: Practice using when to express timing and simultaneous actions.
prompt_zh: 练习用when表达"当…时"的时间关系。
description: 掌握when引导时间从句的用法。
knowledge_points: 时间连词 when 时间 同时
teaching_markdown:
## when 时间从句
when 表示当……时"，引导时间状语从句。

scene_title: - I always listen to music when I run.
- I always drink coffee when I wake up.
- I read when I take the bus.
- Call me when you get home.
- Tell her when you see her."
title: practice_foundation-integrated-express_时间与顺序_when当
before/after 前后
prompt_en: Practice using before and after to express sequence.
prompt_zh: 练习用before和after表达事件的先后顺序。
description: 掌握before和after引导时间从句的用法。
knowledge_points: 时间连词 before after 先后 顺序
teaching_markdown:
## before 和 after 时间从句
before（在……之前）和 after（在……之后）表示事件先后顺序。

## before 用法
- I brush my teeth before I go to bed.
- I eat breakfast before I leave.
- I check my email before I start work.
- Before you leave, please turn off the lights.

## after 用法
- After I finished work, I went to the gym.
- After I woke up, I took a shower.
- After I ate dinner, I watched a movie.
- After you finish, let me know. Then we can go together.

title: while 同时
prompt_en: Practice using while to express simultaneous actions.
prompt_zh: 练习用while表达两个同时进行的动作。
description: 掌握while表示"在…期间"的用法。
knowledge_points: 时间连词 while 同时 同步
teaching_markdown:
## while 时间从句
while 表示在……期间"或"当……的同时"。

scene_title: - We played games while we waited.
- I listened to music while I worked.
- I talked on the phone while I walked.

title: my sister was setting the table.

scene_title: - when + 瞬时动作或持续动作
- Don't use your phone while you're driving."
title: practice_foundation-integrated-express_时间与顺序_while同时
until 直到
prompt_en: Practice using until to express a limit in time.
prompt_zh: 练习用until表达"直到…为止"的时间界限。
description: 掌握until引导时间从句的用法。
knowledge_points: 时间连词 until 直到 界限
teaching_markdown:
## until 时间从句
until 表示直到……为止"。

scene_title: - Please wait here until I come back.
- Stay here until it stops raining.
- Don't leave until I come back.
- Please stay until the meeting ends.
- I didn't know until you told me.
- until: 持续到某个时间点
- before: 在某个时间点之前"
title: practice_foundation-integrated-express_时间与顺序_until直到
时间顺序链
prompt_en: Practice sequencing events with first then after that next finally.
prompt_zh: 练习用First/Then/After that/Next/Finally表达时间顺序。
description: 掌握时间顺序词叙述多步骤事件的能力。
knowledge_points: 顺序词 first then after that finally 叙事
teaching_markdown:
## 时间顺序词
使用顺序词可以让叙述清晰有条理。

## 基本顺序链
- First, I get up. Then, I take a shower. After that, I eat breakfast.
- I went to the supermarket. Next, I went to the bank. Finally, I went home.

## 常用顺序词
| 词 | 用途 |
|----|------|
| First / First of all | 首先 |
| Then / Next | 然后 / 接着 |
| After that / Afterwards | 之后 |
| Finally / Eventually | 最后 |

## at first...but later
- At first, I didn't like the job. But later, I started to enjoy it.
- At first, it was hard. But later, it became easy.

title: for example 举例
prompt_en: Practice using for example to give examples.
prompt_zh: 练习用for example举例说明。
description: 掌握for example举例表达的用法。
knowledge_points: 举例表达 for example 举例 例证
teaching_markdown:
## for example 举例
for example 用来引出具体例子，帮助说明前面的观点。

## 基本用法
- I like sports. For example, I play basketball.
- I enjoy music. For example, I listen to pop.

## 常见句型
- I like movies. For example, I watch comedies.
- I love food. For example, I enjoy hot pot.
- There are many things to do here. For example, you can visit the museum.

## for example vs for instance
- for example = for instance，可以互换使用。

## 相关表达
- such as / like / including（后接名词短语）
- for example / for instance（后接完整句子）

title: also/too/as well 补充
prompt_en: Practice using also too and as well to add information.
prompt_zh: 练习用also/too/as well补充附加信息。
description: 掌握also/too/as well在句中的位置和用法。
knowledge_points: 补充副词 also too as well 补充
teaching_markdown:
## also / too / as well 补充
这三个词都表示也/还"，但位置不同。

scene_title: - 放在be动词/助动词后，实义动词前
- 放在句末，前面通常用逗号
- I like coffee. He likes coffee
title: too.
and she speaks Japanese as well.

scene_title: - You play guitar? I play guitar
title: too.
and he can bake as well."
prompt_en: practice_foundation-integrated-express_举例与补充_alsotooaswell补充

title: besides/what's more 递进
prompt_en: Practice using besides and what's more to add further points.
prompt_zh: 练习用besides和what's more追加更重要的信息。
description: 掌握besides和what's more表达递进的用法。
knowledge_points: 递进表达 besides what's more 进一步
teaching_markdown:
## besides / what's more 递进
这两个词用来追加信息，表示而且/再说/更重要的是"。

scene_title: - It's a nice restaurant. What's more
title: the prices are good.

scene_title: - It's a good movie. What's more
title: it's free!

scene_title: - This hotel is nice. What's more
title: it's near the beach.
but I have no time. Besides
prompt_en: I don't have money.

title: but I'm busy. Besides
prompt_en: tickets are expensive.

scene_title: - what's more: 追加正面信息
- besides: 追加理由（常带有"再说"的语气）"
title: practice_foundation-integrated-express_举例与补充_besideswhatsmore递进
either 否定补充
prompt_en: Practice using either to express agreement in negative sentences.
prompt_zh: 练习用either在否定句中表达"也不"。
description: 掌握either在否定句中表示"也（不）"的用法。
knowledge_points: 否定补充 either 也不 否定
teaching_markdown:
## either 否定补充
either 用在否定句中，表示也不"。

scene_title: - I don't like coffee. I don't like tea
title: either.

scene_title: - I don't eat meat. I don't eat fish
title: either.

scene_title: - I don't drink alcohol. I don't smoke
title: either.

scene_title: - I don't like loud music. I don't like cold weather
title: either.

scene_title: - too: 用于肯定句 → I like it
title: too.

scene_title: - either: 用于否定句 → I don't like it
title: either.

scene_title: ❌ I don't like it too. → 否定句中用either

title: either."
prompt_en: practice_foundation-integrated-express_举例与补充_either否定补充

title: 对话衔接词
prompt_en: Practice discourse markers like well actually by the way anyway.
prompt_zh: 练习well/actually/by the way/anyway等对话衔接词。
description: 掌握日常对话中的口语衔接词。
knowledge_points: 衔接词 well actually by the way anyway
teaching_markdown:
## 对话衔接词（口语润滑剂）
这些词不改变句子意思，但让英语听起来自然流畅。

## Well - 犹豫/思考
- Well, I think it's a good idea.
- Well, I'm not sure.

## Actually - 纠正/补充
- Actually, I don't like coffee. I prefer tea.
- Actually, I changed my mind.

## By the way - 切换话题
- By the way, did you hear about the party?
- By the way, I saw your brother yesterday.

## Anyway - 回到正题
- Anyway, let's get back to the topic.
- Anyway, I have to go now.

## I mean - 解释澄清
- I mean, it's not that I don't want to go. I'm just tired.

## Let me see - 思考
- Let me see... I think the answer is B.

## You know - 引起共鸣
- You know, I've always wanted to learn guitar.

title: 多步骤叙事
prompt_en: Practice multi-step narratives with sequence markers and conjunctions.
prompt_zh: 练习使用顺序词和连词进行多步骤叙事。
description: 掌握用顺序词和连接词叙述多步骤事件。
knowledge_points: 叙事 顺序 多步骤 First Then
teaching_markdown:
## 多步骤叙事
使用顺序词和连词把多个事件连接成完整的叙事。

## 多步骤 + and 并列
- First, I went to the store and bought some food. Then, I came home and cooked dinner. After that, I ate and watched TV.

## before/after 叙事
- Before I go to work, I always take a shower and eat breakfast. After I get home, I usually relax and read a book.

## 关键技巧
- 使用顺序词（First/Then/After that/Finally）
- 使用连接词（and/but/because/so）
- 保持时态一致

title: 因果链叙事
prompt_en: Practice cause-and-effect chain narratives with because and so.
prompt_zh: 练习用because和so进行因果链叙事。
description: 掌握用因果链表达复杂事件的因果关系。
knowledge_points: 因果链 because so 叙事 因果
teaching_markdown:
## 因果链叙事
一个原因导致一个结果，这个结果又成为下一个原因。

## 因果链示例
- I was late for work because I missed the bus, so I had to take a taxi. It was expensive, but I had no choice.

## 原因+结果+评价
- She studied very hard because she wanted to pass the exam, and she did it! I'm so proud of her.

## 常用结构
- Because A..., B happened. So then C... But D...
- A because B, so C. However, D.

title: 条件链叙事
prompt_en: Practice conditional chain narratives with if and unless.
prompt_zh: 练习用if/unless进行条件链叙事。
description: 掌握条件链表达假设和条件关系。
knowledge_points: 条件链 if unless 条件 假设
teaching_markdown:
## 条件链叙事
一个条件导致一个结果，这个结果又是下一个条件。

## 条件+时间
- When I got to the station, the train had already left. If I had left home earlier, I wouldn't have missed it.

## 观点+条件
- I think this is a good idea because it's simple and easy to do. If we try it, we might get good results.

## 对比+条件
- I like living in the city because it's convenient and exciting. However, it's also crowded and expensive.

## 常用结构
- If A, then B. But if C, then D.
- As long as A, B. But if C, D.

title: 时间链叙事
prompt_en: Practice combining time clauses with sequence markers in narratives.
prompt_zh: 练习在叙事中结合时间从句和顺序词。
description: 掌握时间链表达复杂的先后关系。
knowledge_points: 时间链 when after before 叙事
teaching_markdown:
## 时间链叙事
结合时间从句和顺序词表达复杂的时间关系。

## when + 因果
- When I got home, I was really hungry because I didn't eat lunch.

## 综合链
- First, we went to the museum. After that, we had lunch. Then, we walked in the park because the weather was nice.

## 多链叙事的技巧
1. 确定事件顺序
2. 选择合适连接词
3. 保持时态一致
4. 用逗号分隔分句

title: 混合观点表达
prompt_en: Practice expressing mixed opinions with multiple conjunctions.
prompt_zh: 练习使用多种连接词表达复杂观点。
description: 掌握在观点表达中综合使用多种连接词。
knowledge_points: 综合表达 I think because but however besides
teaching_markdown:
## 混合观点表达
在同一段话中使用多种连接词表达复杂的观点。

## 观点+原因+对比
- I think you should take the job because it's a good opportunity. Besides, you can learn a lot of new things there.

## 条件+转折+结果
- As long as you study hard, you'll do well. But if you don't practice enough, you might fall behind.

## 总结+递进
- In conclusion, I believe that learning English is very important. Not only can you talk to more people, but you can also get a better job.

## 常用结构
- I think A because B. However, C.
- In conclusion, I believe that A. Not only B, but also C.
